comment: Very unintuitive, lots of frustrations. So many obvious improvements, so many obvious flaws. Clearly the developers don't use the app, or else they themselves would know its shortcomings and fix them. Simple things, like taking a picture but forgetting to switch what order the translation is in, having to back out and switch it and takr another picture. This could be automated, as this is an app by Google I don't see how it couldn't be, in the very least be able to flip post photo, with a button
key sentence: The key words: taking a picture
the function of activity: The activity facilitates user interaction: search contacts, enable camera flash, access options, select gallery image, use camera for search, and expand translation choices.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Turn flash on', 'description': 'Enable flash for the camera'}, {'name': 'More options', 'description': 'Access additional options menu'}, {'name': 'Select an image from gallery', 'description': "Choose an image from the device's gallery"}, {'name': 'Camera search', 'description': 'Activate camera for search functionality'}, {'name': 'Expand translation menu', 'description': 'Show more translation options'}]
